productDisplayName: Fila Women Cortez Grey Casual Shoes
description: shoes from fila are made with the fine fabrics crafted in Italys materials capital, Biella. This Cortez shoe from fila is an example of the brands excellent craftsmanship. The upper and aggressive lugs on the sole showcase the Italian brands versatile power in innovating. These shoes are made for running on all terrains. The powerful outsole and comfortably built inner and upper guarantee maximum comfort. Wear these with breathable t-shirts and capris.UpperMesh upper with strategically placed synthetic overlays for absolute comfort, enhanced shoe structure and styleLacing system for a snug, customised FitPadded collar and tongue with a textile inner lining for optimum fit and comfortPadded footbed for all-day comfort and impact protection, which is removable to accommodate an orthoticMidsolePhylon midsole for lightweight comfort and impact protectionOutsoleTPR outsole with circular lugs for absolute grip and tractionShoe careWipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dustDo not store in direct sunlightWarranty provided by the brand owner / manufacturer
